scene_description:
### Foreground to Background Description  

**Road Surface & Markings (center foreground to background):**  
- A narrow, paved asphalt road curves to the right. The surface shows signs of wear (lighter patches), with no visible lane markings (no white/yellow lines). The road is single-lane. To the right of the road, a gravel and stone edge (no curb) borders the road, with dark soil and small rocks. The left side of the road is bordered by green grass.  

**Left Foreground:**  
- A large, leafless deciduous tree with a thick trunk and extensive branches dominates the left foreground. Below the tree, green grass covers the ground. To the far left (edge of the image), dry, brown grass and low, brown bushes are visible.  

**Left Middle Ground:**  
- A wooden fence with wire mesh runs parallel to the road. The fence has vertical wooden posts and horizontal wires. A wooden gate is visible in the middle of the fence, slightly left of the road’s curve. Beyond the fence, an open grassy field slopes upward.  

**Right Foreground:**  
- A large, leafless deciduous tree with bare branches extends over the road (right foreground). Adjacent to the road’s right edge (gravel/stone border), dry brown vegetation (bushes and small branches) is present.  

**Right Middle Ground:**  
- A second wooden fence with wire mesh (similar to the left side) runs parallel to the road. The field beyond this fence is grassy, with a slight incline.  

**Background:**  
- The road continues curving left into the distance. In the mid-background, a line of leafless deciduous trees forms a horizon. Beyond the trees, open grassy fields extend to the far background. A low, dark ridge (hilly terrain) is visible under an overcast sky with gray clouds.  

---  
**Note:** No text, signs, infrastructure (e.g., utility poles, street lamps, traffic lights), vehicles, buildings, or distinct curbs are visible in the image. The terrain is flat to gently sloping, with grassy fields and deciduous trees (all leafless).
